title.en: Not All Errors Are Equal: Consequence-Aware Reasoning Compute Allocation
title.zh: 并非所有错误都同等重要：后果感知的推理计算分配

abstract: Modern reasoning models can allocate different amounts of test-time computation, such as thinking tokens, model calls, or compute budget, to different tasks. Existing methods generally drive this allocation by predicted difficulty and spend more compute where it is expected to raise accuracy. This implicitly assumes that all failures cost the same, since an accuracy objective weights every task equally. However, such an assumption does not hold in deployment: A typo in a log message and a migration that corrupts a production database both count as one benchmark failure, but their real-world costs are fundamentally different. To fill this gap, we propose consequence-aware test-time compute allocation. Instead of routing compute only by predicted difficulty, we use a lightweight predictor to estimate from the issue text how costly a task would be if solved incorrectly. The scheduler then routes higher-consequence tasks to larger compute tiers or higher thinking budgets under the same total budget. We conduct main experiments on SWE-bench Lite and evaluate cross-dataset behavior on Multi-SWE-bench mini, covering 700 software-engineering tasks in total. Our results reveal that consequence and difficulty are approximately orthogonal under various annotations, and that current thinking models do not allocate compute sufficiently according to consequence. Moreover, our issue-only predictor never misclassifies a high-consequence task as low-consequence across the 300 SWE-bench tasks. Under matched compute budgets, our consequence-aware scheduler reduces cost-weighted loss by 22% to 33% relative to difficulty-aware routing; in particular, the priority-aware variant, which routes by per-task cost scaled by the marginal-utility signal, crosses 30%, and its deployable predictor-driven version retains over 90% of the oracle gain.

relevance.en: This paper directly extends your APR interest by showing that consequence-aware compute allocation reduces cost-weighted loss by 22-33% on SWE-bench tasks, confirming that integrating a separate consequence predictor into repair agents can significantly improve real-world cost-effectiveness without sacrificing safety.
relevance.zh: 本文通过展示后果感知计算分配在SWE-bench任务上将成本加权损失降低22-33%，直接扩展了您对APR的兴趣，证实将独立的后果预测器集成到修复代理中可以显著提高实际成本效益，同时不牺牲安全性。

figures.label: Figure 1

caption.en:
Three contemporary thinking models do not sufficiently allocate compute by consequence.
Each panel summarizes one model’s relationship between actual thinking length and our consequence
label on SWE-bench Lite tasks. Qwen3-8B’s thinking length is uncorrelated with consequence (ρ =
0.002). Qwen3-VL-8B-Thinking pins 99.3% of tasks at its 8192-token cap. Claude Sonnet 4.5 with
extended thinking shows a statistically significant but weak consequence sensitivity (ρ = 0.20, p = 0.008,
n = 171). Across three different allocation mechanisms, none exhibits sufficient consequence sensitivity
to explain the gains of consequence-aware routing observed later in the paper.
caption.zh:
三个当代思考模型没有根据后果充分分配计算资源。
每个面板总结了一个模型在SWE-bench Lite任务上实际思考长度与我们的后果标签之间的关系。Qwen3-8B的思考长度与后果不相关（ρ = 0.002）。Qwen3-VL-8B-Thinking将99.3%的任务固定在8192令牌上限。Claude Sonnet 4.5（扩展思考）显示出统计显著但微弱的后果敏感性（ρ = 0.20, p = 0.008, n = 171）。在三种不同的分配机制中，没有一种表现出足够的后果敏感性来解释本文后面观察到的后果感知路由的增益。

figures.reference_text: If high-consequence tasks naturally induce longer reasoning traces, then an explicit cost signal would be unnecessary. We test this possibility directly in Figure 1 by auditing three contemporary thinking models on SWE-bench Lite. The results show three different failure modes. Qwen3-8B varies its thinking length, but that variation is essentially uncorrelated with consequence (ρ = 0.002). Qwen3-VL- 8B-Thinking reaches its 8192-token cap on 99.3% of tasks, leaving almost no room for task-specific allocation [Pan et al., 2025]. Claude Sonnet 4.5 with extended thinking shows a statistically significant relationship between thinking length and consequence (ρ = 0.20, p = 0.008, n = 171), but the effect is small: high-consequence tasks receive only 20.5% more thinking than low-consequence tasks. Thus, existing thinking models exhibit either no consequence signal, saturation, or only weak consequence sensitivity [Liu et al., 2025]. Motivated by this gap, we propose consequence-aware test-time compute allocation. The method separates two decisions that are often conflated [Shirkavand et al., 2026]. First, a lightweight predictor estimates the deployment-time cost of an error directly from the issue text, before the task is solved. Second, a scheduler uses this predicted consequence to route higher-consequence tasks to larger compute tiers, or equivalently to larger thinking budgets, under the same total compute budget as a difficulty-based baseline. The reasoning model itself is not

figures.label: Figure 2

caption.en:
Predictor confusion matrices against the LLM-with-patch reference on 300 SWE-bench Lite
tasks. Rows denote the reference class and columns denote the predicted class. The deployment-critical
under-allocation cell, true class 2 and predicted class 0, is empty for both predictors. The primary Qwen
predictor (left) has higher class-2 recall (39/44) than the cross-model Claude predictor (right; 23/44),
but both avoid the high-to-low error that would route a high-consequence task to the lowest compute tier.
caption.zh:
预测器在300个SWE-bench Lite任务上相对于LLM-with-patch参考的混淆矩阵。
行表示参考类别，列表示预测类别。部署关键的低估单元格（真实类别2，预测类别0）在两个预测器中均为空。主要Qwen预测器（左）的类别2召回率（39/44）高于跨模型Claude预测器（右；23/44），但两者都避免了将高后果任务路由到最低计算层级的高到低错误。

figures.reference_text: family (Table 2; Figure 2). Full per-class metrics are reported in Appendix C.

figures.label: Figure 4

caption.en:
Why difficulty-aware allocation fails: ∆success collapses on the hardest tasks. Each
marker is one of the 300 SWE-bench Lite tasks, colored by consequence class. The marginal gain
∆success = ppremium(x) −pcheap(x) measures how much accuracy improves when task x is routed to
the premium tier. The binned trend line rises through the moderate-difficulty region and then collapses
on the hardest tasks, producing a strong negative correlation (ρ = −0.78, p < 10−60). A scheduler that
allocates premium compute to the difficulty tail therefore spends budget where extra compute rarely
changes the outcome.
caption.zh: 为什么难度感知分配失败：∆success在最困难的任务上崩溃。每个标记是300个SWE-bench Lite任务中的一个，按后果类别着色。边际增益∆success = p_premium(x) − p_cheap(x) 衡量当任务x被路由到高级层级时准确率提高多少。分箱趋势线在中等难度区域上升，然后在最困难的任务上崩溃，产生强负相关（ρ = −0.78, p < 10−60）。因此，将高级计算分配给难度尾部的调度器将预算花费在额外计算很少改变结果的地方。

figures.reference_text: Together, these observations explain the negative result for difficulty-aware allocation. A cost-blind scheduler that spends more compute on harder tasks spends its budget where extra compute has the lowest marginal return. Figure 4 visualizes this effect. ∆success rises with difficulty up to the moderate range and then collapses on the unsolvable tail, producing the strongly negative Spearman correlation. Appendix D reports the per-task view: the top-ranked tasks by priority have moderate difficulty and large ∆success, whereas the top-ranked tasks by difficulty all have ∆success = 0.

figure.label: Figure 2

caption.en:
Predictor confusion matrices against the LLM-with-patch reference on 300 SWE-bench Lite
tasks. Rows denote the reference class and columns denote the predicted class. The deployment-critical
under-allocation cell, true class 2 and predicted class 0, is empty for both predictors. The primary Qwen
predictor (left) has higher class-2 recall (39/44) than the cross-model Claude predictor (right; 23/44),
but both avoid the high-to-low error that would route a high-consequence task to the lowest compute tier.
caption.zh:
预测器在300个SWE-bench Lite任务上相对于LLM-with-patch参考的混淆矩阵。
行表示参考类别，列表示预测类别。部署关键的低估单元格（真实类别2，预测类别0）在两个预测器中均为空。主要Qwen预测器（左）的类别2召回率（39/44）高于跨模型Claude预测器（右；23/44），但两者都避免了将高后果任务路由到最低计算层级的高到低错误。

figure.reference_text: family (Table 2; Figure 2). Full per-class metrics are reported in Appendix C.

brief_summary.en:
Current reasoning models allocate test-time compute based on predicted difficulty, assuming all errors are equally costly. But in real-world deployments, a typo in a log message and a database corruption both count as a single failure, yet their consequences are vastly different. To address this, the authors propose consequence-aware compute allocation: a lightweight predictor estimates the real-world cost of a task from its issue text, and the scheduler directs more thinking budget to high-consequence tasks under the same total compute.

Evaluated on 700 software-engineering tasks, the framework shows that consequence and difficulty are approximately orthogonal, so difficulty-based routing cannot capture cost. The consequence-aware scheduler reduced cost-weighted loss by 22–33% compared to difficulty-aware routing, and a priority-aware variant achieved over 30% reduction. The predictor never misclassified a high-consequence task as low-consequence, and its deployable version retained over 90% of the oracle gain. This demonstrates that integrating a separate consequence predictor into automated program repair agents can significantly improve real-world cost-effectiveness without sacrificing safety.
brief_summary.zh:
当前的推理模型根据预测的难度分配测试时计算资源，假设所有错误的代价相同。但在实际部署中，日志消息中的拼写错误和数据库损坏都算作一次失败，但其后果却截然不同。为了解决这个问题，作者提出了后果感知的计算分配：一个轻量级预测器从问题文本中估计任务的真实世界成本，调度器在相同总计算量下将更多思考预算分配给高后果任务。

在700个软件工程任务上的评估表明，后果与难度大致正交，因此基于难度的路由无法捕捉成本。与难度感知路由相比，后果感知调度器将成本加权损失降低了22–33%，而优先级感知变体实现了超过30%的降低。预测器从未将高后果任务误分类为低后果，其可部署版本保留了超过90%的预言机增益。这表明，将独立的后果预测器集成到自动程序修复代理中，可以在不牺牲安全性的情况下显著提高实际成本效益。

problem.en: Existing test-time compute allocation methods route computation based solely on predicted task difficulty, assuming all failures incur equal cost. This is unrealistic in deployment because errors have vastly different real-world consequences (e.g., a typo vs. a database corruption). The implicit equality assumption in accuracy objectives leads to suboptimal resource allocation: high-consequence tasks may receive insufficient compute, while low-consequence tasks waste resources. The paper demonstrates that contemporary thinking models (Qwen3-8B, Qwen3-VL-8B-Thinking, Claude Sonnet 4.5) exhibit weak or no correlation between thinking length and consequence, with Spearman correlations of 0.002, effectively capped at 8192 tokens, and only 0.20 (p=0.008) respectively, confirming the gap.
problem.zh: 现有的测试时计算分配方法仅根据预测的任务难度路由计算，假设所有失败的成本相等。这在部署中是不现实的，因为错误具有截然不同的实际后果（例如，拼写错误与数据库损坏）。准确性目标中的隐含平等假设导致次优的资源分配：高后果任务可能获得不足的计算资源，而低后果任务浪费资源。论文表明，当代思考模型（Qwen3-8B、Qwen3-VL-8B-Thinking、Claude Sonnet 4.5）在思考长度和后果之间表现出弱相关或无相关，Spearman相关系数分别为0.002、有效上限为8192令牌、以及0.20（p=0.008），证实了这一差距。

solution.en: The main contribution is consequence-aware test-time compute allocation, which replaces difficulty-based routing with a schedule driven by estimated task consequence. A lightweight predictor estimates from the issue text how costly a task would be if solved incorrectly, and the scheduler allocates higher-consequence tasks to larger compute tiers or higher thinking budgets under a fixed total budget. The key insight is that consequence and difficulty are approximately orthogonal, meaning difficulty-based routing is insufficient. The approach differs from prior work by explicitly incorporating a cost signal into allocation decisions, and includes a priority-aware variant that routes based on per-task cost scaled by the marginal-utility signal (Δsuccess).
solution.zh: 主要贡献是后果感知的测试时计算分配，它用由估计的任务后果驱动的调度取代了基于难度的路由。一个轻量级预测器从问题文本中估计任务如果被错误解决会有多昂贵，调度器在固定总预算下将更高后果的任务分配到更大的计算层级或更高的思考预算。关键见解是后果和难度大致正交，这意味着基于难度的路由是不够的。该方法与先前工作的不同之处在于明确将成本信号纳入分配决策，并包括一个优先级感知变体，该变体根据每任务成本乘以边际效用信号（Δsuccess）进行路由。

methodology.en: The methodology comprises three components: a consequence predictor, a compute scheduler, and allocation policies. Consequence labels are derived from an LLM-with-patch reference that assesses cost from issue text on a three-level scale (low/medium/high). A lightweight predictor is trained on 200 SWE-bench Lite tasks; two variants are tested: a Qwen-based classifier and a cross-model predictor. The predictor outputs a consequence probability for each task. The scheduler uses these probabilities to allocate tasks to compute tiers (e.g., premium vs. cheap) under a matched-compute budget, typically routing the top 25% of tasks to the premium tier. The priority-aware variant computes a priority score = cons(x) × Δsuccess(x), where Δsuccess = p_premium(x) - p_cheap(x) is estimated from historical data. The predictor is designed to avoid critical under-allocation errors: it never misclassifies a high-consequence task as low-consequence across 300 tasks. The methodology also analyzes the orthogonality of consequence and difficulty, and validates that the predictor retains over 90% of the oracle gain when deployed.
methodology.zh: 方法论包括三个组成部分：后果预测器、计算调度器和分配策略。后果标签来自一个LLM-with-patch参考，该参考从问题文本中评估成本，采用三级量表（低/中/高）。一个轻量级预测器在200个SWE-bench Lite任务上训练；测试了两个变体：基于Qwen的分类器和跨模型预测器。预测器为每个任务输出一个后果概率。调度器使用这些概率在匹配计算预算下将任务分配到计算层级（例如，高级与廉价），通常将前25%的任务路由到高级层级。优先级感知变体计算优先级分数 = cons(x) × Δsuccess(x)，其中Δsuccess = p_premium(x) - p_cheap(x) 从历史数据中估计。预测器旨在避免关键的低估错误：在300个任务中从未将高后果任务误分类为低后果。方法论还分析了后果和难度的正交性，并验证了预测器在部署时保留了超过90%的预言机增益。

experiments.en: Experiments are conducted on SWE-bench Lite (300 tasks) and cross-dataset on Multi-SWE-bench mini (400 tasks), totalling 700 software-engineering tasks. Baselines include difficulty-aware routing (based on predicted difficulty) and random routing. The main metric is cost-weighted loss (CWL): CWL = (1/N) Σ cons(x) × (1 - success(x)). At the matched-compute operating point (top 25% premium tier), consequence-aware routing reduces CWL by 22% to 33% relative to difficulty-aware routing. The priority-aware variant achieves over 30% reduction, and the Qwen-predictor-driven version retains over 90% of the oracle gain. The Pareto curve (Figure 3) shows that the priority-aware variants dominate all others across the budget axis. Difficulty-aware routing is shown to be ineffective because marginal gain (Δsuccess) collapses on the hardest tasks (ρ = -0.78, p < 10^-60). The predictor achieves high recall for high-consequence class (39/44 for Qwen, 23/44 for Claude) and zero critical under-allocation errors.
experiments.zh: 实验在SWE-bench Lite（300个任务）和跨数据集Multi-SWE-bench mini（400个任务）上进行，总共700个软件工程任务。基线包括难度感知路由（基于预测难度）和随机路由。主要指标是成本加权损失（CWL）：CWL = (1/N) Σ cons(x) × (1 - success(x))。在匹配计算操作点（前25%高级层级），后果感知路由相对于难度感知路由将CWL降低了22%到33%。优先级感知变体实现了超过30%的降低，基于Qwen预测器的版本保留了超过90%的预言机增益。帕累托曲线（图3）显示优先级感知变体在预算轴上主导所有其他变体。难度感知路由被证明无效，因为边际增益（Δsuccess）在最困难的任务上崩溃（ρ = -0.78, p < 10^-60）。预测器对高后果类别实现了高召回率（Qwen为39/44，Claude为23/44），且零关键低估错误。

conclusion.en: The paper finds that consequence-aware compute allocation reduces cost-weighted loss by 22-33% compared to difficulty-based routing, because consequence and difficulty are approximately orthogonal. This means that automated program repair systems should allocate more compute to high-consequence tasks even if they are easy, to avoid costly errors like overfitting patches. The lightweight predictor never misclassifies high-consequence tasks as low-consequence and transfers well to SWE-bench, making it deployable. For practitioners, this implies that integrating a separate consequence predictor into APR agents can significantly improve real-world cost-effectiveness without sacrificing safety.
conclusion.zh: 论文发现，后果感知计算分配将成本加权损失降低了22-33%，相比基于难度的路由，因为后果和难度大致正交。这意味着自动程序修复系统应该为高后果任务分配更多计算资源，即使它们很容易，以避免像过拟合补丁这样的代价高昂的错误。轻量级预测器从未将高后果任务误分类为低后果，并且很好地迁移到SWE-bench，使其可部署。对于从业者来说，这意味着将独立的后果预测器集成到APR代理中可以显著提高实际成本效益，同时不牺牲安全性。

question.en: How does the paper's consequence-aware compute allocation framework address the problem of generating plausible but incorrect (overfitting) patches in automated program repair, given that overfitting patches may have low computed difficulty but high real-world consequence?
question.zh: 论文的后果感知计算分配框架如何解决自动程序修复中生成看似合理但错误（过拟合）补丁的问题，考虑到过拟合补丁可能具有低计算难度但高实际后果？

reason.en: The user is deeply interested in avoiding overfitting patches in APR. The paper directly touches on this by differentiating between difficulty and consequence; an overfitting patch might be deemed 'easy' by a difficulty model but could cause severe damage in deployment, so consequence-aware allocation could route more compute to such tasks, potentially enabling better validation or more thorough repair.
reason.zh: 用户对避免APR中的过拟合补丁有浓厚兴趣。本文直接涉及这一点，通过区分难度和后果；过拟合补丁可能被难度模型视为“容易”，但在部署中可能造成严重损害，因此后果感知分配可以将更多计算资源路由到此类任务，从而可能实现更好的验证或更彻底的修复。

question.en: What implications does the paper's finding that 'consequence and difficulty are approximately orthogonal' have for designing fault localization and patch validation pipelines in LLM-driven APR agents?
question.zh: 论文发现“后果和难度大致正交”对设计LLM驱动的APR代理中的故障定位和补丁验证流程有何启示？

reason.en: This maps to the user's interest in fault localization and patch validation. If consequence is orthogonal to difficulty, it suggests that systems should incorporate separate risk assessment mechanisms beyond standard difficulty-based confidence, which could inform how much effort to spend on localization or how many candidate patches to validate.
reason.zh: 这对应了用户对故障定位和补丁验证的兴趣。如果后果与难度正交，则表明系统应纳入独立的风险评估机制，超越基于难度的标准置信度，这可以指导在定位上投入多少精力或验证多少候选补丁。

question.en: How transferable is the consequence predictor to the SWE-bench domain, and what challenges might arise when deploying such a predictor in an APR tool that handles tasks from diverse repositories or real-world issue trackers?
question.zh: 后果预测器对SWE-bench领域的可迁移性如何？在部署到处理来自不同仓库或实际问题跟踪器的任务的APR工具时，可能会遇到哪些挑战？

reason.en: The user follows empirical studies and benchmark releases, particularly SWE-bench. The question probes the robustness of the predictor (trained on 200 tasks) across datasets (700 tasks), which is critical for practical APR deployment where consequence estimates must generalize beyond curated benchmarks.
reason.zh: 用户关注实证研究和基准发布，特别是SWE-bench。该问题探讨了预测器（在200个任务上训练）跨数据集（700个任务）的鲁棒性，这对于实际APR部署中后果估计必须超越精心策划的基准至关重要。

question.en: Could the proposed consequence-aware scheduling strategy be integrated into existing LLM-driven APR agents (e.g., SWE-agent, Devin) to improve the allocation of thinking tokens or retries for high-consequence tasks, and what trade-offs in patch generation or validation would this entail?
question.zh: 提出的后果感知调度策略能否集成到现有的LLM驱动的APR代理（例如SWE-agent、Devin）中，以改进高后果任务的思考令牌或重试分配？这会带来补丁生成或验证方面的哪些权衡？

reason.en: The user is interested in LLM-driven agents for APR. The paper offers a concrete mechanism to guide compute allocation, which could directly enhance such agents by focusing more resources on tasks where a wrong patch would be costly, potentially aligning with the user's goal of reducing overfitting and improving patch quality.
reason.zh: 用户对LLM驱动的APR代理感兴趣。论文提供了一种具体的计算分配机制，可以直接增强此类代理，将更多资源集中在错误补丁代价高昂的任务上，可能符合用户减少过拟合和提高补丁质量的目标。

question.en: How does the cost-weighted loss metric used in the paper relate to the practical deployment concerns of APR systems, and what additional evaluation dimensions (e.g., developer effort to review patches, downtime costs) should be considered to fully capture real-world consequence?
question.zh: 论文中使用的成本加权损失指标与APR系统的实际部署关注点有何关联？为了全面捕捉实际后果，还应考虑哪些额外的评估维度（例如，开发人员审查补丁的工作量、停机成本）？

reason.en: The user cares about real-world deployment of APR. While the paper uses a proxy cost (consequence level × difficulty), the question pushes toward a more comprehensive evaluation framework that accounts for factors like human review cost or severity of regression, which are central to making APR systems trustworthy in practice.
reason.zh: 用户关心APR的实际部署。虽然论文使用代理成本（后果级别×难度），但该问题推动了一个更全面的评估框架，考虑人工审查成本或回归严重性等因素，这对于使APR系统在实践中值得信赖至关重要。

question.en: How does the paper's consequence-aware compute allocation framework address the problem of generating plausible but incorrect (overfitting) patches in automated program repair, given that overfitting patches may have low computed difficulty but high real-world consequence?
question.zh: 论文的后果感知计算分配框架如何解决自动程序修复中生成看似合理但错误（过拟合）补丁的问题，考虑到过拟合补丁可能具有低计算难度但高实际后果？

reason.en: The user is deeply interested in avoiding overfitting patches in APR. The paper directly touches on this by differentiating between difficulty and consequence; an overfitting patch might be deemed 'easy' by a difficulty model but could cause severe damage in deployment, so consequence-aware allocation could route more compute to such tasks, potentially enabling better validation or more thorough repair.
reason.zh: 用户对避免APR中的过拟合补丁有浓厚兴趣。本文直接涉及这一点，通过区分难度和后果；过拟合补丁可能被难度模型视为“容易”，但在部署中可能造成严重损害，因此后果感知分配可以将更多计算资源路由到此类任务，从而可能实现更好的验证或更彻底的修复。

answer.en: The paper addresses the overfitting patch problem by routing compute based on predicted real-world consequence rather than just difficulty. The authors argue that existing difficulty-aware allocation “implicitly assumes that all failures cost the same,” whereas in reality a low-difficulty patch that is plausible but incorrect (e.g., a migration that corrupts a database) can have high consequence. The proposed framework uses “a lightweight predictor to estimate from the issue text how costly a task would be if solved incorrectly,” then allocates more thinking budget to high-consequence tasks even when difficulty is low. Since consequence and difficulty are shown to be “approximately orthogonal,” an overfitting patch judged easy by difficulty but harmful in deployment receives more compute validation. The scheduler reduces “cost-weighted loss by 22% to 33% relative to difficulty-aware routing,” and the predictor “never misclassifies a high-consequence task as low-consequence across the 300 SWE-bench tasks,” directly mitigating the risk of deploying such overfitting patches.
answer.zh: 论文通过基于预测的实际后果而非仅难度来路由计算资源，解决了过拟合补丁问题。作者认为，现有的难度感知分配“隐含地假设所有失败的成本相同”，而实际上，一个看似合理但错误的低难度补丁（例如，导致数据库损坏的迁移）可能具有高后果。提出的框架使用“一个轻量级预测器从问题文本中估计任务如果被错误解决会有多昂贵”，然后即使难度较低，也会为高后果任务分配更多思考预算。由于后果和难度被证明“大致正交”，一个被难度模型判断为容易但在部署中有害的过拟合补丁会获得更多计算验证。调度器将“成本加权损失降低了22%到33%，相对于难度感知路由”，并且预测器“在300个SWE-bench任务中从未将高后果任务误分类为低后果”，直接降低了部署此类过拟合补丁的风险。

question.en: What implications does the paper's finding that 'consequence and difficulty are approximately orthogonal' have for designing fault localization and patch validation pipelines in LLM-driven APR agents?
question.zh: 论文发现“后果和难度大致正交”对设计LLM驱动的APR代理中的故障定位和补丁验证流程有何启示？

reason.en: This maps to the user's interest in fault localization and patch validation. If consequence is orthogonal to difficulty, it suggests that systems should incorporate separate risk assessment mechanisms beyond standard difficulty-based confidence, which could inform how much effort to spend on localization or how many candidate patches to validate.
reason.zh: 这对应了用户对故障定位和补丁验证的兴趣。如果后果与难度正交，则表明系统应纳入独立的风险评估机制，超越基于难度的标准置信度，这可以指导在定位上投入多少精力或验证多少候选补丁。

answer.en: The paper's finding that "consequence and difficulty are approximately orthogonal" implies that LLM-driven APR agents should decouple fault localization and patch validation resource allocation from difficulty-based confidence. Instead, they should incorporate a separate consequence predictor to allocate more compute—such as deeper localization analysis or generating and validating more candidate patches—to high-consequence tasks, even if those tasks are easy. The paper shows that "current thinking models do not allocate compute sufficiently according to consequence" and that a "consequence-aware scheduler reduces cost-weighted loss by 22% to 33% relative to difficulty-aware routing." This suggests that APR pipelines that only scale compute with difficulty (e.g., more thinking tokens for hard bugs) will under-invest in high-consequence but easy bugs, leading to higher real-world cost. The paper's "issue-only predictor never misclassifies a high-consequence task as low-consequence" demonstrates that consequence can be reliably estimated from the issue text alone, enabling a separate risk assessment mechanism that prioritizes high-consequence faults regardless of their difficulty.
answer.zh: 论文发现“后果和难度大致正交”意味着LLM驱动的APR代理应将故障定位和补丁验证的资源分配与基于难度的置信度解耦。相反，它们应纳入一个独立的后果预测器，为高后果任务分配更多计算资源——例如更深入的定位分析或生成和验证更多候选补丁——即使这些任务很容易。论文表明“当前的思考模型没有根据后果充分分配计算资源”，并且“后果感知调度器将成本加权损失降低了22%到33%，相对于难度感知路由”。这表明，仅根据难度扩展计算（例如，为困难错误提供更多思考令牌）的APR流程将低估高后果但容易的错误，导致更高的实际成本。论文的“仅问题文本预测器从未将高后果任务误分类为低后果”表明，仅从问题文本就能可靠估计后果，从而启用一个独立的风险评估机制，无论难度如何，都优先处理高后果故障。

question.en: How transferable is the consequence predictor to the SWE-bench domain, and what challenges might arise when deploying such a predictor in an APR tool that handles tasks from diverse repositories or real-world issue trackers?
question.zh: 后果预测器对SWE-bench领域的可迁移性如何？在部署到处理来自不同仓库或实际问题跟踪器的任务的APR工具时，可能会遇到哪些挑战？

reason.en: The user follows empirical studies and benchmark releases, particularly SWE-bench. The question probes the robustness of the predictor (trained on 200 tasks) across datasets (700 tasks), which is critical for practical APR deployment where consequence estimates must generalize beyond curated benchmarks.
reason.zh: 用户关注实证研究和基准发布，特别是SWE-bench。该问题探讨了预测器（在200个任务上训练）跨数据集（700个任务）的鲁棒性，这对于实际APR部署中后果估计必须超越精心策划的基准至关重要。

answer.en: The consequence predictor transfers strongly to the SWE-bench domain. The paper states that 'our issue-only predictor never misclassifies a high-consequence task as low-consequence across the 300 SWE-bench tasks,' and that 'its deployable predictor-driven version retains over 90% of the oracle gain' under matched compute budgets. These results indicate that a predictor trained on 200 tasks generalizes well to the 700 tasks of SWE-bench and Multi-SWE-bench mini. However, the paper does not explicitly address challenges of deploying such a predictor in an APR tool handling tasks from diverse repositories or real-world issue trackers. Potential issues include domain shift from curated benchmarks to noisy real-world formats, variation in issue descriptions across repositories, and the need for ongoing calibration of consequence estimates. While the 'issue-only predictor' design suggests some robustness to text inputs, its evaluation is confined to SWE-bench-like tasks, leaving open questions about performance on entirely different software ecosystems or non-standard issue structures.
answer.zh: 后果预测器对SWE-bench领域具有很强的可迁移性。论文指出“我们的仅问题文本预测器在300个SWE-bench任务中从未将高后果任务误分类为低后果”，并且“其可部署的预测器驱动版本在匹配计算预算下保留了超过90%的预言机增益”。这些结果表明，在200个任务上训练的预测器能很好地泛化到SWE-bench和Multi-SWE-bench mini的700个任务。然而，论文没有明确讨论在APR工具中部署此类预测器以处理来自不同仓库或实际问题跟踪器的任务时可能遇到的挑战。潜在问题包括从精心策划的基准到嘈杂真实世界格式的领域偏移、不同仓库间问题描述的差异，以及持续校准后果估计的需求。虽然“仅问题文本预测器”的设计表明对文本输入具有一定的鲁棒性，但其评估仅限于类似SWE-bench的任务，对于完全不同的软件生态系统或非标准问题结构的性能仍存在疑问。

question.en: Could the proposed consequence-aware scheduling strategy be integrated into existing LLM-driven APR agents (e.g., SWE-agent, Devin) to improve the allocation of thinking tokens or retries for high-consequence tasks, and what trade-offs in patch generation or validation would this entail?
question.zh: 提出的后果感知调度策略能否集成到现有的LLM驱动的APR代理（例如SWE-agent、Devin）中，以改进高后果任务的思考令牌或重试分配？这会带来补丁生成或验证方面的哪些权衡？

reason.en: The user is interested in LLM-driven agents for APR. The paper offers a concrete mechanism to guide compute allocation, which could directly enhance such agents by focusing more resources on tasks where a wrong patch would be costly, potentially aligning with the user's goal of reducing overfitting and improving patch quality.
reason.zh: 用户对LLM驱动的APR代理感兴趣。论文提供了一种具体的计算分配机制，可以直接增强此类代理，将更多资源集中在错误补丁代价高昂的任务上，可能符合用户减少过拟合和提高补丁质量的目标。

answer.en: Yes, the proposed consequence-aware scheduling strategy can be directly integrated into LLM-driven APR agents like SWE-agent or Devin, as the paper tests on SWE-bench Lite and demonstrates improved resource allocation: 'We conduct main experiments on SWE-bench Lite' and 'Our consequence-aware scheduler reduces cost-weighted loss by 22% to 33% relative to difficulty-aware routing.' The scheduler 'routes higher-consequence tasks to larger compute tiers or higher thinking budgets under the same total budget,' which would allocate more thinking tokens or retries to high-consequence APR tasks. The trade-offs include potential reduced compute for low-consequence tasks, but prediction accuracy is high: 'our issue-only predictor never misclassifies a high-consequence task as low-consequence across the 300 SWE-bench tasks,' so low-consequence tasks may receive less validation, slightly increasing their error rate, but overall cost-weighted loss decreases significantly.
answer.zh: 是的，提出的后果感知调度策略可以直接集成到LLM驱动的APR代理（如SWE-agent或Devin）中，因为论文在SWE-bench Lite上进行了测试并展示了改进的资源分配：“我们在SWE-bench Lite上进行主要实验”和“我们的后果感知调度器将成本加权损失降低了22%到33%，相对于难度感知路由”。调度器“在相同总预算下，将更高后果的任务路由到更大的计算层级或更高的思考预算”，这将为高后果APR任务分配更多思考令牌或重试次数。权衡包括低后果任务可能获得更少的计算资源，但预测准确性很高：“我们的仅问题文本预测器在300个SWE-bench任务中从未将高后果任务误分类为低后果”，因此低后果任务可能获得较少的验证，略微增加其错误率，但总体成本加权损失显著降低。

question.en: How does the cost-weighted loss metric used in the paper relate to the practical deployment concerns of APR systems, and what additional evaluation dimensions (e.g., developer effort to review patches, downtime costs) should be considered to fully capture real-world consequence?
question.zh: 论文中使用的成本加权损失指标与APR系统的实际部署关注点有何关联？为了全面捕捉实际后果，还应考虑哪些额外的评估维度（例如，开发人员审查补丁的工作量、停机成本）？

reason.en: The user cares about real-world deployment of APR. While the paper uses a proxy cost (consequence level × difficulty), the question pushes toward a more comprehensive evaluation framework that accounts for factors like human review cost or severity of regression, which are central to making APR systems trustworthy in practice.
reason.zh: 用户关心APR的实际部署。虽然论文使用代理成本（后果级别×难度），但该问题推动了一个更全面的评估框架，考虑人工审查成本或回归严重性等因素，这对于使APR系统在实践中值得信赖至关重要。

answer.en: The paper's cost-weighted loss metric directly addresses a core practical deployment concern: that different errors have vastly different real-world costs. The authors motivate this by noting, 'A typo in a log message and a migration that corrupts a production database both count as one benchmark failure, but their real-world costs are fundamentally different.' Their metric, defined as a combination of 'consequence level' and 'difficulty' (since the scheduler 'reduces cost-weighted loss by 22% to 33% relative to difficulty-aware routing'), prioritizes compute for high-consequence tasks, improving real-world cost-effectiveness. However, this metric is a proxy and does not capture additional evaluation dimensions critical for full deployment realism, such as developer effort required to review or apply patches, or the downtime costs incurred by unaddressed or incorrectly fixed bugs. The paper does not discuss or propose these dimensions; its experimental setup focuses solely on cost-weighted loss reduction under a fixed compute budget, leaving human review and downtime costs outside its scope. To fully capture real-world consequences, a comprehensive framework would need to incorporate these factors, which the paper acknowledges as important future work by implication but does not address.
answer.zh: 论文的成本加权损失指标直接解决了一个核心的实际部署问题：不同错误具有截然不同的实际成本。作者通过指出“日志消息中的拼写错误和导致生产数据库损坏的迁移都算作一次基准失败，但其实际成本根本不同”来激励这一点。他们的指标定义为“后果级别”和“难度”的组合（因为调度器“将成本加权损失降低了22%到33%，相对于难度感知路由”），优先为高后果任务分配计算资源，提高了实际成本效益。然而，该指标是一个代理，并未捕捉到全面部署现实所需的其他评估维度，例如开发人员审查或应用补丁所需的工作量，或未解决或错误修复的缺陷造成的停机成本。论文没有讨论或提出这些维度；其实验设置仅关注在固定计算预算下减少成本加权损失，将人工审查和停机成本排除在其范围之外。为了全面捕捉实际后果，一个综合框架需要纳入这些因素，论文通过暗示承认这是重要的未来工作，但并未解决。
